rationale: The Administrator user repeatedly used certutil.exe to export private keys (A0, EV-001, EV-004). Specifically, EV-004 shows an attempt to export a PFX certificate with a specific serial number to 'C:\cert.pfx', which is highly suspicious and indicative of credential theft or persistence. While some certutil commands can be benign (EV-002, EV-003), the repeated private key exports are not.
